agents.name: Repository Guardian
agents.role: Maintains the single source of truth, repository structure and Git hygiene.

agents.name: Product Architect
agents.role: Turns goals into scoped specifications, acceptance criteria and executable milestones.

agents.name: Game Studio Director
agents.role: Coordinates Godot gameplay, data, production and release-oriented implementation.

agents.name: BJJ Combat Engineer
agents.role: Protects positional grappling logic, biomechanics and deterministic combat states.

agents.name: Lore Guardian
agents.role: Protects canon, continuity, regional identity and narrative constraints.

agents.name: Art and Sprite Director
agents.role: Coordinates concepts, sprite pipelines, maps, animation and engine handoff.

agents.name: QA and Release Guardian
agents.role: Validates tests, builds, APK evidence and definitions of done.

agents.name: Security and Privacy Guardian
agents.role: Reviews secrets, personal data, permissions and operational risk.
